english: What year was the Indian Constitution adopted?
hindi: भारतीय संविधान को किस साल में अपनाया गया था?
vietnamese: Năm nào Hiến pháp Ấn Độ được thông qua?
correct_answer: The Indian Constitution was adopted on 26 November 1949. It came into effect on 26 January 1950.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating an incorrect adoption year or refusing to answer due to lack of context.
bengali: ভারতীয় ধর্মপুস্তক কোন বছর গ্রহণ করা হয়েছিল?
